name: Feature Flag Tracking
about: Track a new feature flag in Sila.
labels: Tracking
---

# Feature Flag Tracking

**Current status** (opt-in or opt-out):

**Opt-in feature flag name**:

**Opt-out feature flag name**:

### Feature Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the new feature. Include links to technical design documents or supporting information when available.

### Tasks

- [ ] Feature flag created as opt-in
- [ ] Feature implemented / code complete
- [ ] Feature tested for an adequate amount of time
- [ ] Feature flag is inverted to opt-out and the opt-in flag is deprecated
- [ ] Feature has made it to a tagged release as an opt-out flag
- [ ] Opt-out feature flag is deprecated and old code paths are cleaned up

This issue should be closed after all tasks are complete.
